key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether the volume limiter is active at all. Mirrored by the Quick Settings toggle.

key.name: limit-percent
key.description: The maximum percentage of the volume bar allowed when a matching headphone device is active.

key.name: action-mode
key.summary: What happens when the user tries to exceed the limit
key.description: warn-prompt: clamp back to the limit and show a notification with an "Allow anyway" action for this session. warn-allow: show a notification but let the volume go through. block: silently clamp back to the limit, no notification.

key.name: device-mode
key.summary: Whether to limit all headphone-like outputs or one specific device

key.name: specific-device-id
key.summary: Identifier of the specific device to limit
key.description: Only used when device-mode is "specific". For Bluetooth devices this is the MAC address (e.g. 78:15:2D:56:69:F4). For the wired jack, this is the literal string "wired-jack".

key.name: specific-device-label
key.summary: Human-readable label of the specific device, for display in prefs
